# unifi_device_tags (Data Source)

All device tags on the site. Use it to resolve a tag's UUID and the devices it groups.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List device tags, then resolve one by name to its UUID and grouped devices.
data "unifi_device_tags" "all" {}

locals {
  iot_tag = one([for t in data.unifi_device_tags.all.device_tags : t if t.name == "iot-access-points"])
}

output "iot_tag_id" {
  value = local.iot_tag.id
}

output "iot_tag_device_ids" {
  value = local.iot_tag.device_ids
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `device_tags` (Attributes List) The device tags. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--device_tags))

<a id="nestedatt--device_tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `device_tags`

Read-Only:

- `device_ids` (List of String) UUIDs of the devices this tag is applied to.
- `id` (String) Device tag UUID.
- `name` (String) Device tag name.
